hero_subtitle: The app that lets you choose how to progress: train with an AI that adapts to your level, or find a human coach who fits your sport and your budget. Not the other way around.
hero_meta: TRAIN · TRACK · EVOLVE   ·   EST 2026 · PARIS   ·   FR · EN
split_left_body: Build your plan with AI, or find the coach who matches your level and your budget. No need to sign up for 6 months at €200 a session.
split_right_body: Build your programs, manage your clients, and find new athletes without grinding Instagram all day. Coaching, without the paperwork.
athletes_section_sub: Three ways to train. You pick based on your budget, your autonomy, your sport. And you switch whenever you want.
athletes_f1_body: Describe your goal, your level, your equipment, your constraints. The AI builds an adapted program and adjusts it every week based on your feedback. No generic PDF downloaded off Google.
athletes_f2_body: Filter by sport, level, budget (€15/month to €500/month — you see it all). Verified profiles, transparent pricing, first call free. No bullshit, no hidden commitment.
athletes_f3_body: Human coach for strategic phases, AI for the day-to-day. Best of both worlds, without paying a fortune for sessions your coach wouldn't have changed anyway.
athletes_strip: LOAD TRACKING · SESSION LOGS · PROGRESS CHARTS · MEASUREMENTS · NUTRITION · TIMERS · BUILT-IN MUSIC
athletes_testimonial_quote: I tried 4 apps before. They all sell you the same PDF, just prettier. 6way got me my first real sub-3min squats of the year.
coachs_section_sub: Everything you need to run your business, plus a marketplace that brings you qualified clients. Without a 30% lifetime cut.
coachs_f1_body: Full exercise library, reusable templates, auto periodization (mesocycles, deload weeks), automatic progressive overload. You prescribe, the app handles the rest.
coachs_f2_body: Complete profiles (measurements, history, photos), session log, messaging, planning. No more Excel sheets or iPhone Notes.
coachs_f3_body: Public profile on the 6way marketplace. Athletes find you by sport and budget. 15% for the first 3 months, 0% after. The client stays yours.
coachs_f4_body: White-label PDF exports of your programs — your logo, your colors. You send your clients a real deliverable, not a screenshot.
coachs_pricing_body: No mandatory yearly plan. No hidden fees. No freemium that walls you off the moment you get serious.
system_sub: Because there are six ways to progress, and no app had combined them. Until now.
system_1_body: Program adapted to your sport, your level, your gear. Built in 2 minutes by AI or by your coach.
system_2_body: Real-time guided sessions. Timers, suggested loads, form videos. No app that crashes mid-set.
system_3_body: Load logs, RPE, RIR, weekly volume. Progress charts. You know where you stand, not just how you feel.
system_4_body: Needs calculation, meal plans, macro tracking, recipes. Nutrition/training sync (on/off days, peri-workout).
system_5_body: Coach ↔ athlete: messages, weekly check-ins, adjustments. Community by sport and by level if you want.
system_6_body: Automatic progressive overload, deload weeks, regular retests. The app evolves the program with you, not the opposite.
why_1_body: Trainerize, MyFitnessPal, Fitbod: built for the coach OR the athlete, never both. And the marketplace doesn't exist.
why_2_body: The classic indie coach stack. Works up to 5 clients, becomes hell at 15. You lose more time on admin than on coaching.
why_3_body: For the athlete: too expensive for most, and you also pay for the weeks the coach just watches you. With 6way, you pick your economic model.
waitlist_body: Private beta this spring. Coaches: founder pricing for life. Athletes: 3 months on us. We onboard in waves of 50.
waitlist_legal: NO SPAM · 1-CLICK UNSUBSCRIBE · DATA NEVER SOLD
waitlist_success: ✅ You're on the list. We'll be in touch soon.
faq_a1: Private beta from summer 2026, in invite waves. Public release end of 2026.
faq_a2: Athletes: free AI version for the base program, subscription for advanced features (coach sync, exports, etc.). Coaches: free trial then monthly or yearly plan. Pricing details at launch.
faq_q3: Can I import my existing programs?
faq_a3: Yes, via CSV or copy-paste. We also support template imports from the main coaching tools (Trainerize, TrueCoach, Hexfit).
faq_q4: Does the AI replace a real coach?
faq_a4: No, and it doesn't pretend to. The AI is great for daily tracking, automatic progression, and load adjustments. For long-term strategy, technical execution, and human support, a coach stays irreplaceable. That's why we combine the two.
faq_q5: How do you take your cut from coaches?
faq_a5: 15% for the first 3 months of a client found through the marketplace. After that, 0%. The client is yours — you can bill them off-platform if you prefer. We want to bring you clients, not tax you for life.
faq_a6: European hosting, encryption, full GDPR compliance. You can export and delete all your data in 1 click. We don't sell anything, and we don't use your training data to train public models.
faq_a7: Yes for the essentials: today's program, set logging, timer. Auto-sync when you're back online.
faq_a8: Not yet. Bootstrap project, built by a solo founder who knows what coaching is. We want a product that pays for its servers before chasing investors.
footer_tagline: Your coach. Your AI. Your way.
legal_mentions_content: 6way is a product of From6 Agency.
